rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core mechanism: both study how competitor/rival advertising affects focal advertising effectiveness and outcomes (the citing note includes own and rival ad effects; the cited note centers on competitive interference attenuating own advertising elasticity). Both also use TV advertising exposure measures (e.g., GRPs) in market-response settings, suggesting potential methodological and conceptual dependence rather than a generic background mention. Given this overlap, it is not safe to treat as obvious mention-only.
